notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Ramón Laureano. Spencer Horwitz scores. Konnor Griffin scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by catcher Freddy Fermin.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Ryan O'Hearn out at 3rd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Ryan O'Hearn out at 3rd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Spencer Horwitz out at 2nd. Konnor Griffin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum singles on a line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Nick Yorke scores. Nick Gonzales to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Ramón Laureano. Spencer Horwitz scores. Konnor Griffin scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by catcher Freddy Fermin.
